description: Crawls start URLs and extracts page content (markdown, HTML, or text) using Crawl4AI. On CafeScraper, the worker connects only to the platform's remote fingerprint browser via CDP (no local Chromium). Configurable depth, wait conditions, and output format.

properties.title: Start URLs
properties.name: startUrls
properties.description: Starting URLs to crawl (e.g. https://example.com). One or more URLs.

properties.title: Max pages
properties.name: maxPages
properties.description: Maximum pages to process in total (1–10000).

properties.title: Max depth
properties.name: maxDepth
properties.description: Maximum link depth from each start URL (0–10).

properties.title: Concurrency
properties.name: concurrency
properties.description: Number of concurrent page tasks (1–50).

properties.title: Request timeout (seconds)
properties.name: requestTimeoutSecs
properties.description: Timeout per page request in seconds (5–600).

properties.title: Headless
properties.name: headless
properties.description: Run browser headless.

properties.title: Use proxy
properties.name: useProxy
properties.description: Use platform proxy when PROXY_AUTH is set.

properties.title: Extract mode
properties.name: extractMode
properties.description: Output content format: markdown, html, or text.

properties.title: Max results
properties.name: maxResults
properties.description: Maximum output items to push (1–200000).

properties.title: Same domain only
properties.name: sameDomainOnly
properties.description: Only follow links within start URL domains.

properties.title: Include URL patterns
properties.name: includePatterns
properties.description: Only include URLs matching these regex patterns (optional).

properties.title: Exclude URL patterns
properties.name: excludePatterns
properties.description: Exclude URLs matching these regex patterns.

properties.title: Max retries
properties.name: maxRetries
properties.description: Retry failed pages up to this count (0–10).

properties.title: Clean content
properties.name: cleanContent
properties.description: Remove navigation-heavy lines and normalize whitespace.

properties.title: Include raw content
properties.name: includeRawContent
properties.description: Include unmodified content in a separate field.

properties.title: Max content characters
properties.name: maxContentChars
properties.description: Truncate content to this length (0 = unlimited, max 500000).

properties.title: Content excerpt characters
properties.name: contentExcerptChars
properties.description: Length of content excerpt for previews (0–5000).

properties.title: Wait until
properties.name: waitUntil
properties.description: Page load strategy: domcontentloaded (fast), load, or networkidle (SPA/slow sites).

properties.title: Wait for selector
properties.name: waitForSelector
properties.description: CSS selector to wait for before extraction (e.g. .article-body). Use css: or js: prefix for advanced.

properties.title: CSS selector (extract region)
properties.name: cssSelector
properties.description: Extract only content inside this CSS selector (e.g. main, .content).

properties.title: Crawl mode
properties.name: crawlMode
properties.description: full = extract content; discover_only = only URLs and links (no content).

properties.title: Include link URLs
properties.name: includeLinkUrls
properties.description: Include links_internal and links_external arrays in each item (full mode).
